heading: Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
label: 150707 Exclusive right to name, seals, emblems, and badges
text: The corporation has the exclusive right to use the name “National Conference on Citizenship” and seals, emblems, and badges the corporation adopts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15070736:446., .Aug. 13, 1953, ch. 427, § 1667 Stat. 565The word “sole” is omitted as unnecessary and for consistency in the revised title.
